name: chatgpt-prompt-launcher
title: ChatGPT Prompt Launcher
description: Open ChatGPT with predefined prompts for translation, branch naming, and PR titles
author: ryo-kihara

commands.name: ask-chatgpt
commands.title: Ask ChatGPT
commands.description: Send a message to ChatGPT with a predefined suffix

preferences.name: translateSuffix
preferences.title: Translate Suffix
preferences.description: Suffix appended when using the Translate action
preferences.default: 日本語なら英語に、英語なら日本語に翻訳して

preferences.name: branchNameSuffix
preferences.title: Branch Name Suffix
preferences.description: Suffix appended when using the Branch Name action
preferences.default: シンプルなブランチ名にして

preferences.name: prTitleSuffix
preferences.title: PR Title Suffix
preferences.description: Suffix appended when using the PR Title action
